title: rosa × dumetorum var. incanescens
intro: Rosa × dumetorum var. incanescens, also known as the Rosa dumetorum, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the rose family (Rosaceae) and is native to parts of Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum var. incanescens include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, which can be used to treat various ailments, or it can be dried and used as a powder for topical applications.
